summary: Good soundboard remaster with solid audio quality, though performance details are scarce
review: The single review praises this as a very good remaster of an already existing master, indicating a clean and enjoyable listening experience. No specific comments on the musical performance or setlist were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one positive review (4 stars) focusing on the remaster quality; lack of show detail limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a very good remaster, implying clear and well‑balanced sound with no noted issues.
